description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 4 mins of coding time. His WakaTime activity was mostly Other (94%), with Java accounting for 6%. The data shows activity across 2 projects, but no public repository commits, pull requests, or new repos.
